title: Middlesex County Public Schools ransomware incident

extortion.description: MCPS has been identified as a “School Division of Innovation” fordesigning and implementing alternatives to traditional instructional practices and school structures that improve student learning and promote college and career readiness, and good citizenship.Unfortunately, the School have no worries about lost 543 GB of students and teachers personal information, school projects, financial info and so on and so forth. All of this will be available for download soon.
